Event: Mushroom Loot - April 2026
Event Date: 09/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AM336
Celestial Roar Amulet

Once in a while, the fighter launches a magic ball at a random enemy fighter. The ball bounces up to 3 times. Upon hitting, the ball removes 3 random positive effects from the target and steals 15% of all parameters for 4 seconds. A maximum of 1 effects. The owner of the amulet also increases these parameters for 3 random allied fighters by the value of the stolen parameters for 4 seconds.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 9 secs
